proposals.title: File duplication in code generation output
proposals.lesson: Code generation produced duplicate files: This refactor consolidates **5 duplicate ViewModels and 4 service versions** into a single canonical implementation, addressing all critical compilati. Extraction pipeline needs deduplication.
